---
title: "AntSciHub"
listing:
  - id: templates-list
    contents: "Templates/**/*Template.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: _listing/templates-list.ejs.md
    fields: [title, description]
    sort: title
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

Welcome to AntSciHub v4

Very much WIP. Please excuse the dust 🏗️

## What is AntSciHub?

{{< include front-page/_what-is-antscihub.qmd >}}

## Templates

These templates are maintained as reusable Quarto starting points.

::: {#templates-list}
:::
